name: VariableMeasured with DDI-CDI extensions
abstract: Schema defining properties for schema.org variableMeasured with some DDI-CDI properties, for implementation of CDIF discovery XAS profile. Implemented as schema.org/PropertyValue. Defines properties: @type, cdi:identifier, cdi:physicalDataType, cdi:intendedDataType, cdi:role, cdi:describedUnitOfMeasure, cdi:simpleUnitOfMeasure, cdi:uses, cdi:name, cdi:displayLabel. Uses building blocks: definedTerm (schemaorgProperties), variableMeasured (schemaorgProperties).
